form.label: Compliance - Local Users & Group Review
form.description: Annual review of local user account compliance. Account baselines are maintained by the team in Azure DevOps.

search.query:
index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" earliest=-3y latest=now | spath input=_raw path=time output=job_time
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | eval year = substr(job_time, 1, 4) | stats count by year | sort - year | fields year

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" earliest=-3y latest=now | spath input=_raw path=time output=job_time
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (substr(job_time, 1, 4)="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") | eval month_num = substr(job_time, 6, 2) | eval month_sort = substr(job_time, 1, 7) | eval month_label = case( month_num="01", "Jan " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="02", "Feb " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="03", "Mar " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="04", "Apr " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="05", "May " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="06", "Jun " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="07", "Jul " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="08", "Aug " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="09", "Sep " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="10", "Oct " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="11", "Nov " + substr(job_time, 1, 4), month_num="12", "Dec " + substr(job_time, 1, 4) ) | stats first(month_label) as month_label first(month_sort) as month_sort by month_num | sort - month_sort | fields month_num month_label

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" earliest=-3y latest=now | spath input=_raw path=time output=job_time
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (substr(job_time, 1, 4)="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (substr(job_time, 6, 2)="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | stats count by device | fields device

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" earliest=-3y latest=now | spath input=_raw path=time output=job_time
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (substr(job_time, 1, 4)="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (substr(job_time, 6, 2)="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by department | fields department

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" earliest=-3y latest=now | spath input=_raw path=time output=job_time
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (substr(job_time, 1, 4)="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (substr(job_time, 6, 2)="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") AND (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | stats count by group | fields group

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" earliest=-3y latest=now | spath input=_raw path=time output=job_time
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (substr(job_time, 1, 4)="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (substr(job_time, 6, 2)="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") AND (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") AND (group="$filter_group$" OR "$filter_group$"="*") | stats count by hostname | fields hostname

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" earliest=-3y latest=now | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | stats count by reviewed_by | fields reviewed_by
